title: Frequently Asked Questions
subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about Lqani.ma

q1.question: What is Lqani.ma?
q1.answer: Lqani.ma is a platform dedicated to helping people in Morocco find lost persons, pets, documents, electronics, vehicles, and other belongings. Users can post reports of missing or found items to connect with others.

q2.question: What should I do if I find a missing person or item?
q2.answer: If you find someone or something that appears to be lost, create a sighting report on Lqani.ma by clicking 'I Found'. Provide as many details and photos as possible to help the owner identify their belongings.

q3.question: Do I need an account to use Lqani.ma?
q3.answer: Yes, you need to create an account to use Lqani.ma. An account is required to browse reports, post listings, comment, and contact report owners.

q1.question: How do I report a missing person or item?
q1.answer: Click the 'I Lost' button in the header, fill in the details including photos, description, last known location, and submit your report. It will be visible to all users immediately.

q2.question: How do I report a found person or item?
q2.answer: Click the 'I Found' button in the header, provide details about what you found including photos and location, and submit your sighting report.

q3.question: Can I edit or delete my report after posting?
q3.answer: Yes, you can edit or delete your reports at any time from the 'My Reports' section in your profile.

q4.question: What types of items can I report?
q4.answer: You can report missing or found persons, pets, documents (ID cards, passports), electronics (phones, laptops), vehicles, and other belongings.

q1.question: How do I create an account?
q1.answer: Click 'Sign Up' and provide your email, name, and password to create your account.

q2.question: How do I reset my password?
q2.answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login dialog, enter your email address, and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

q3.question: Can I change my email address?
q3.answer: Yes, you can change your email from the Profile settings page. A verification email will be sent to your new address to confirm the change.

q1.question: How do I contact a report owner?
q1.answer: Click the 'Contact Owner' button on any report to send a direct message. You can also visit their profile and click 'Send Message'.

q2.question: Are my messages private?
q2.answer: Yes, all messages are private and can only be seen by you and the person you're messaging.

q1.question: Is my personal information safe?
q1.answer: We take your privacy seriously. Your personal data is encrypted and never shared with third parties. See our Privacy Policy for more details.

q2.question: How do I report inappropriate content?
q2.answer: If you see inappropriate content, please contact us through the Contact page with details about the report, and our team will review it promptly.

contact.title: Still have questions?
contact.description: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Feel free to contact our support team.
